overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a snowy sci-fi village at dusk, entering a glowing circular portal, and navigating through the industrial interior of the Dormir Refectory with neon-lit corridors and a large circular bar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered village street with stone buildings and neon signage

events.description: approaching the large glowing circular portal structure at the end of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy village street toward the glowing portal, passing wooden carts and barrels

notable_agents.action: villager standing near a wooden cart watching the character approach

entered.detail: tall stone structures with snow-covered roofs and wooden beam accents
large circular archway structure with orange neon runic symbols
snow-packed street surface with visible footprints and drifts
utility wires and cables strung between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snow-covered street lined with historic stone buildings. Overhead cables crisscross between structures, and a large glowing circular portal glows orange in the distance. A villager stands near a wooden cart on the right, observing the character's approach.

events.description: character steps through the glowing circular portal into the interior space
environment lighting shifts from cool blue outdoor to warm red indoor glow

agents.ego_description: walking through the circular portal threshold, transitioning from outdoor snow to indoor metal flooring

entered.detail: glowing circular frame with ancient runic symbols emitting orange light
stone door frame marking the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the glowing circular portal, leaving the snowy street behind. The environment transitions from open sky to enclosed stone archways with red artificial lighting replacing the natural dusk light.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with metal grating and signage

events.description: UI text 'THE DORMIR REFECTORY' appears identifying the location

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow industrial corridors with metal flooring and exposed piping

notable_agents.action: refectory worker standing against the wall near a doorway

entered.detail: dark metal panel walls with industrial piping and conduits
glowing blue and orange signs indicating the refectory entrance
faded advertisements and notices plastered on stone walls
exposed ventilation ducts and cable runs along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves through narrow industrial corridors with metal walls and grated flooring. Neon signage indicates the Dormir Refectory ahead. A worker stands against the right wall as the character passes various posters and industrial piping.

scene_state.functional_zone: large circular bar refectory with dining areas and warm lighting

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into large open refectory hall with circular central bar
ambient lighting shifts from cool blue corridor tones to warm orange glow from the bar area

agents.ego_description: walking around the refectory observing the circular bar and dining patrons, moving past tables

notable_agents.action: bartender working behind the circular counter preparing drinks
diners seated at round tables eating and conversing

entered.detail: large curved bar with glowing orange light strips and hanging meat carcasses
round tables with food platters and seated patrons
large stone support columns with exposed metal piping
various meat cuts suspended from ceiling racks above the bar

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large open hall dominated by a circular bar with warm orange lighting. Patrons sit at round tables eating and drinking, while a bartender works behind the counter. The space features industrial pillars and hanging meat displays, creating a bustling refectory atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cold, snowy village street into the warm, industrial interior of a bustling refectory. It begins by following a character through a narrow lane of historic stone buildings and crisscrossing cables, moving toward a large, glowing orange portal in the distance. As the character passes through the portal, the open dusk sky vanishes, and the environment shifts abruptly into enclosed stone archways bathed in red artificial light. The scene then transitions into narrow industrial corridors of metal walls and grated flooring, passing neon signage and piping before opening into a vast hall. Finally, the camera reveals a large circular bar with warm orange lighting, where patrons gather at round tables beneath industrial pillars and hanging meat displays.
